category_sources: Official Watchman README describes it as a file watching service.
source_facts.description says Watchman watches files and takes action when they change.
display_name_sources: Official repository and documentation use Watchman.
docs_sources: Official Watchman README points users to https://facebook.github.io/watchman/ for documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/facebook/watchman; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official docs describe file queries, file notification facilities, and language clients.
source_facts.description identifies file watching and change-triggered actions.
